title: rosa communis var. allionii
intro: Rosa communis var. allionii, also known as Allion's rose, is a variety of Rosa communis, a flowering plant in the rose family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin, wounds, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Rosa communis var. allionii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, and support immune function. Rosa communis var. allionii is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used topically as a poultice or salve to treat various health conditions.
